description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, giving it a ribbed appearance. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the slightly mottled, dark gray stone surface. The block is solid and robust, with sharp, clean edges and a uniform thickness. Its sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian design. The overall look suggests durability and resistance to wear, suitable for high-traffic or outdoor urban environments. The coloration is predominantly dark, with subtle variations in tone that mimic natural stone.
description: A rectangular, grooved stone block with a dark, mottled surface and deep parallel channels across the top. It appears solid, durable, and designed for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the block's rectangular face and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the grooves running away from the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the full width of the block and the horizontal grooves.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again emphasizing the length and depth of the grooves from a different perspective.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
